title: Rise To Liquid Level Behavior
description: Allows the mob to stay at a certain level when in liquid.

liquid_y_offset.title: Liquid y Offset
liquid_y_offset.description:
Target distance down from the liquid surface. i.e. Positive values move the target Y down.

Sample values:
• strider: 0.25

rise_delta.title: Rise Delta
rise_delta.description:
Movement up in Y per tick when below the liquid surface.

Sample values:
• strider: 0.01

sink_delta.title: Sink Delta
sink_delta.description:
Movement down in Y per tick when above the liquid surface.

Sample values:
• strider: 0.01

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
